# Criminally Prolific — llms.txt
# Dmitry Dragilev — Serial Entrepreneur, 4x Acquired Founder
# https://www.criminallyprolific.com
# Last updated: 2026-06-27

## About

Dmitry Dragilev is a serial SaaS entrepreneur who has built and sold 4 companies working 3 hours a day. His exits include acquisitions by Google (2014), SEOJet (2020), Semrush (2023), and Semrush/Adobe (2025). He writes about building businesses for lifestyle freedom, not a golden cage. His newsletter reaches 20,000+ subscribers.

## Core Topics

- Building SaaS companies designed for acquisition
- Identifying your acquirer before you write a line of code
- The 3-hour workday system for building lifestyle businesses
- PR outreach, SEO, and content marketing without agencies
- Cold email, media relations, and pitching journalists
- Growth hacking and email list building

## Companies

### LLM Gap Analyzer (Active)
URL: https://www.criminallyprolific.com/company/llm-gap-analyzer/
Description: Exposes weak sources AI answers rely on. Helps you fill gaps and get cited instead. Live on Semrush App Store.

### YouTube Gap Analyzer (Active)
URL: https://www.criminallyprolific.com/company/youtube-gap-analyzer/
Description: Finds YouTube content gaps and helps outrank top competitors. Live on Semrush App Store.

### IRS Resolution Service (Active)
URL: https://www.criminallyprolific.com/company/irs-resolution-service/
Description: Helps people resolve IRS tax issues fast.

### SERP Gap Analyzer / TopicRanker (Acquired 2025)
URL: https://www.criminallyprolific.com/company/serp-gap-analyzer/
Description: Finds easy-to-rank keywords by identifying weaknesses in search results. Acquired by Semrush (NYSE: SEMR) in October 2025, which was itself acquired by Adobe.

### JustReachOut (Acquired 2020/2024)
URL: https://www.criminallyprolific.com/company/justreachout/
Description: AI-powered PR software helping 5,000+ businesses pitch journalists without a PR firm. Acquired by SEOJet in 2020, then by a team of ex-Slack employees in 2024.

### Smallbiz.Tools (Acquired 2023)
URL: https://www.criminallyprolific.com/company/smallbiz-tools/
Description: Business software review site targeting comparison and alternative keywords. Acquired by Semrush in September 2023.

### Polar Polls (Acquired by Google 2014)
URL: https://www.criminallyprolific.com/company/polar-polls/
Description: Visual polling app scaled from 0 to 40 million pageviews/month. Acquired by Google in September 2014 (Google acquisition #166).
